description: Using a single on-chain DEX spot price from an illiquid pool lets attackers move the price with small trades or flash loans, then exploit inflated/deflated valuations for lending, liquidations, or swaps.
name: Reliance on Low-Liquidity Spot Prices
remediation: - Require minimum liquidity thresholds and sanity bounds before trusting a pool. - Use robust oracles (Chainlink, TWAP, median of multiple feeds) instead of raw spot prices. - Apply deviation checks against reference feeds and revert when deviation exceeds limits.
